query: Create launch-ready motion videos for your products review

results.title: Motion: A video agent for tasteful motion design | Product Hunt
results.content:
Motion is our new frontier video agent made for tasteful motion design. Here's how it works:

1. Give Motion a prompt — include any context like product links, X threads, YouTube videos, personal assets, and more. Motion will reference styles, incorporate research, and storyboard scenes.  
  
2. Motion creates the video — it can orchestrate entire explainers, launch videos, logo animations, or even add motion design to your own talking head videos. Motion has taste in its visual animation.  
  
3. Edit everything — resize, drag and drop, modify elements, or iterate with chat. Tell Motion to iterate on selections or add new elements until you’re satisfied. No need to re-generate entire scenes or deal with hallucinated artifacts. [...] To see what Motion can do, check out our launch video, which was made entirely with Motion.

Motion is in early access but we are giving everyone that finds us on ProductHunt free invite codes. Sign up for Motion today with access code phmotion.

For support, please jump into our growing Discord community and if you're interested in API access or end-to-end produced launch videos, please schedule a quick call.

Mohsin Ali
PicWish

PicWish

@adishj great work but make the flow smooth

Adish Jain
Mosaic

Mosaic

@mohsinproduct are you referring to the flow between visual frames for Motion or the onboarding flow?

Mohsin Ali
PicWish

PicWish

@adishj visuals

Rugved Chavan [...] And yep, we have version control built in so you can undo any manual changes or go back to any checkpoint in the chat just like with Cursor.

Rugved Chavan

@adishj Ohh cool then, All the best

Jim Jeffers

The element-level editing is the right place to be opinionated. For product/launch videos, “tasteful” usually depends on constraints that are easy to lose: brand pacing, how much product proof appears before flourish, which animations feel off-brand, and which references are actually approved.

Hi Product Hunt, I’m Sharon, and I built Screenhance! I made it because screenshots are everywhere (landing pages, docs, decks, portfolios), but making them look good usually means design tools or extra time. With Screenhance, you can: → pick a layout (single or multi screenshot) → choose a background or go transparent → add subtle motion if you want → export clean, high-quality assets fast It’s in beta, so I’d love feedback, especially on: What you’d use it for What feels missing Anything that breaks

Woah. I was able to spin up a product mockup video for my landing page using a simple screen capture in ~15 minutes. Customization was a breeze and I especially loved the transparent background export. Totally worth checking out!
